# FP Release Assets

Recommended:

```text
fp-universal-v{version}.zip
```

Smaller packs:

```text
fp-codex-v{version}.zip
fp-claude-code-v{version}.zip
fp-gemini-cli-v{version}.zip
fp-github-copilot-cli-v{version}.zip
fp-cursor-v{version}.zip
fp-windsurf-v{version}.zip
fp-cline-v{version}.zip
fp-roo-code-v{version}.zip
fp-opencode-v{version}.zip
fp-kiro-v{version}.zip
fp-github-copilot-editor-v{version}.zip
fp-aider-v{version}.zip
fp-copy-paste-v{version}.md
```

All adapters delegate to one canonical router. Release validation checks contract examples, behavior invariants, BOM/frontmatter, metadata, and byte-for-byte generated pack parity before assets are built.
